summary.concern: Charles Harris — Argyle TX — 22 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 108. 63 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Clifford Clack — Gym Addition, Karim-Merchant — cleared all overdue.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 34 days past due with 22 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **47 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $27,000 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 46 days past due with 19 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,981 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **38 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,314 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 44 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 20 days past due with 7 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 5 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **55 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $12,575 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Down to 4 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **84 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,199 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Down to 2 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **33 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,607 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Karim-Merchant:** **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Jonas De Cardenas:** Carrying 22 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 19 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

395 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **351 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 13 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$111,797 in payments going out this week** across 52 tasks — make sure funds are available. $11,800 expected in from 2 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 7. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** Down to 5 overdue — good. Close them out today. **55 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 67 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Down to 2 overdue — good. Close them out today. **33 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Clean — 5 tasks in progress. **12 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 20 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **47 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 47 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
